IMPORTANT NOTICES

This account is a Traditional (pre-tax) 401(k). Contributions are made on a
pre-tax basis and reduce your current taxable income. Withdrawals in retirement
are subject to ordinary income tax.

Roth 401(k): Your plan offers a Roth 401(k) option. You currently have no
balance in the Roth sub-account.

SECURE 2.0 Update: Required Minimum Distributions for Roth 401(k) accounts
have been eliminated effective 2024. If you roll your 401(k) to a Roth IRA,
no RMDs will be required during your lifetime.

For information about your plan: Acme Corp Benefits — HR Portal
For account questions: Fidelity NetBenefits 1-800-835-5097

Statement generated: January 20, 2025
